title: BatteryStatusPayload
description: Payload for battery_status events emitted by the EV3 on a periodic timer

voltage_v.description: Battery voltage in volts (derived from voltage_mv for readability)

current_ma.description: Battery current draw in milliamps (negative = charging)

percentage.description: Estimated remaining charge as a percentage

is_critical.description: True when voltage is below the low-battery threshold
